taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Engineering, Data Engineer
must_have_quals: 3+ years of hands-on experience in Python, 3+ years of hands-on experience in using advanced SQL queries and writing/optimizing highly efficient SQL queries, 2+ years of working in AWS environment, Experience with Git, Experience with Docker, Comfortable working with business customers to collect requirements and gain a deep understanding of varied business domains, Knowledge of software coding practices across the development lifecycle, including agile methodologies, coding standards, code reviews, source management, build processes, testing, and operations, Bachelor's degree or equivalent in an engineering or technical field such as Computer Science, Information Systems, Statistics, Engineering, or similar
preferred_quals: Experience integrating with 3rd party APIs is highly desirable
core_responsibilities: Develop and maintain scalable data pipelines and build out new API integrations to support continuing increases in data volume and complexity, Work with business teams and analysts to understand complex business rules and implement these for deriving insights, Implement processes and systems to monitor data quality, ensuring production data is always accurate and available for key stakeholders and business processes that depend on it, Perform data analysis required to troubleshoot data related issues and assist in the resolution of data issues, Provide thought leadership and collaborate with other team members to continue to scale our architecture to evolve for the needs of tomorrow, Develop and support continuous integrations build and deployment processes using Jenkins, Docker, Git, etc, Define and implement monitoring and alerting policies for data solutions
job_summary: Take-Two Interactive is a leading developer, publisher, and marketer of interactive entertainment. They are seeking a dynamic Data Engineer to design, build, and maintain reliable and scalable data solutions while collaborating with business teams to derive insights from complex data.
